name: Runway Growth Finance Corp.
business: Runway Growth Finance Corp. is an externally managed, non-diversified closed-end management investment company structured as a business development company (BDC). It provides senior secured loans to high growth-potential companies in technology, healthcare, business services, financial services, select consumer services and products and other high-growth industries. Its investment objective is to maximize total return to stockholders primarily through current income on its loan portfolio and secondarily through capital gains on warrants and equity positions.
sellsTo: High growth-potential companies in technology, healthcare, business services, financial services, select consumer services and products

exposures.sentence: We are a specialty finance company focused on providing senior secured loans to high growth-potential companies in technology, healthcare, business services, financial services, select consumer services and products and other high-growth industries.

catalysts.sentence: On May 7, 2025, the Board of Directors approved a share repurchase program (the "Fourth Repurchase Program"), under which we may repurchase up to $25.0 million of our outstanding shares of common stock, at management's discretion from time to time in open-market transactions and in accordance with all applicable securities laws and regulations.

catalysts.event: Application for new co-investment exemptive order
catalysts.sentence: On September 12, 2025, we, RGC and certain affiliates applied for a new co-investment exemptive order from the SEC, which would permit us to enter into certain negotiated co-investment transactions alongside certain affiliates in a manner consistent with our investment objective, positions, policies, strategies, and restrictions, as well as regulatory requirements and other pertinent factors, subject to compliance with such order.

tamClaims.claim: The venture debt lending market is estimated at $62.4 billion, or roughly 18.4% of total U.S. venture capital deal value.
tamClaims.sentence: The venture debt lending market, as defined in the Q4 2025 Pitchbook-NVCA Venture Monitor, is estimated at $62.4 billion, or roughly 18.4% of total U.S. venture capital deal value.

tamClaims.claim: Venture capital deal volume in the technology industry totaled approximately $313.8 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Q4 2025 Pitchbook-NVCA Venture Monitor and Pitchbook-NVCA industry classifications, venture capital deal volume in the technology industry totaled approximately $313.8 billion in 2025, representing a 16.2% CAGR from 2015 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Venture capital deal volume in the life sciences industry totaled approximately $36.3 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Venture capital deal volume in the life sciences industry totaled approximately $36.3 billion in 2025, representing an 8.0% CAGR from 2015 to 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 14,716 companies received venture capital financing in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 14,716 companies received venture capital financing in 2025, according to the Pitchbook-NVCA Venture Monitor.
